etymology.description: 隹(隹) (zhuī, "bird") + 木(木) (mù, "tree") = birds gathering on a tree -> assemble
etymology.interpretation: The character 集(jí, "assemble") depicts birds resting on a tree, which intuitively represents gathering or assembling. This image of multiple birds converging on a single tree naturally leads to the sense of collecting or assembling together.

examples.chinese: 我们在公司门口集合(我們在公司門口集合)。
examples.english: We assemble at the company entrance.

examples.chinese: 书籍是人类智慧的结晶(書籍是人類智慧的結晶)。
examples.pinyin: Shūjí shì rénlèi zhìhuì de jiéjīng.
examples.english: Books are the crystallization of human wisdom.

examples.chinese: 他们每天在操场上集合(他們每天在操場上集合)，准备训练(準備訓練)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen měitiān zài cāochǎng shàng jíhé, zhǔnbèi xùnliàn.
examples.english: They assemble on the field every day, ready to train.
